title: Double Jump
description: CoffeeG's Double Jump!Add Double Jump,Wall Jump, Leap and Wall Bounce mechanic in minecraft
body:
# THIS DATAPACK/MOD/PLUGIN NOW REQUIRE [FokusAPI](https://modrinth.com/datapack/fokusapi)
# 🛠 **Double Jump**!
> ☁ Simple datapack that adds double jump,leap and wall bounce mechanic to minecraft ✔

## Features
> Showcase (Note : All features below can be customized by using `/function dbjump:menu/main`)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/zjRgJiCxW6U" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


### QOL Features
+ **⚠ Warning** : Double jump is auto-disabled while you using creative mode ( `1.0.3` or above)
- **Faster Sprinting** (1.0.9 or above) : Sprinting faster (20% than normal)
---
### Main Features
- **Leap** (1.0.3 or above) : Press shift before a jump to jump higher 
> Leap has been replaced with Charged Jump in 2.1
- **Charged Jump** (2.1 or above) : Press sneak before a jump to jump higher, hold sneak longer - jump higher
    - Demo in First Person:
    <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-fw6beCpF60" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

- **Double jump** (Of course) : Press shift in air and press JUMP 
    - Demo:
        - Third Person:\
    ![image](https://media4.giphy.com/media/HADKUBekITTSDRA9FM/giphy.gif)
        - First Person : \
    ![image](https://media1.giphy.com/media/73m3KQycr2oCq8Z1e4/giphy.gif)

- **Wall Bounce** (Re-added `1.0.8` or above) : You will gain an extra mid-air jump by touching a wall or block.
    - Demo in Third Person:\
    ![image](https://media1.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExNW45czdtam1ibGZkcWYzZ2h4dnpxaHdyYnkxNTVsaTkzb2Q4cGZxOSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/xSnVpWlk1hiaaxv0oE/giphy.gif)
> WallBounce has many advantages if you master this skill!

## Try my other datapacks/mods/plugins:
+ [**Brutal Nightmare**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/brutal-nightmare) - Minecraft, but with insane difficulty. Zombie place/break blocks, throw TNT. Skeleton, Creeper, Ghasts, Spider,Phantom,... get new abilities.New mini bosses...
+ [**Adrenaline Rush**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/adrenaline-rush) - Add "final shout" & "second chance" mechanic into minecraft! You'll have 0,5 HP instead of dying when fall from height ; Buff your power when you at low HP
+ [**Useful Snowball**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/usefulsnowball) - Useful Snowball! Make snowball slows mob.
+ [**Wall Climbing**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/coffwallclimb) - Add Wall Climb (Wall Jump) mechanic to minecraft
+ [**Awful Lightning**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/coffeegs-awful-lightning) - Struck lightning on players more oftenly, can create fun & surprising deaths with lightning bolts.
## Uninstall
You can easily remove datapack/mod file from `datapacks`/`mods` folder. Also if you have any suggestion , here my discord `xd6t` or you can post an issue in Issue link instead.
